source_note: Order of the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission on the application of Indianapolis Power & Light Company d/b/a AES Indiana for approval of a fuel cost factor for the September–November 2021 billing months under I.C. 8-1-2-42, IURC Cause No. 38703 FAC 132, issued August 25, 2021.
